meta.title: Stardew Valley Scheduler
meta.description: A cycling 28-day, 4-season calendar notepad for Stardew Valley - stay ahead of festivals, birthdays, and crops.

home.title: Stardew Valley Scheduler
home.subtitle: A cycling calendar notepad - today's tasks and upcoming events at a glance

dashboard.rainPromptBody: It rains tomorrow, so no watering needed. Add a watering can upgrade today?
dashboard.rainBundleItems: Bundle items only obtainable on rainy days
dashboard.deleteBody: Delete just this item, or delete the related tasks for the same crop across all dates.

memo.selectDay: Select a day from the calendar
memo.heading: {season} {day}

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetDesc: Restores all saved settings (bundles, character, tasks, etc.) to defaults. This cannot be undone.
settings.orderHint: Drag the ⠿ handle to reorder; check to show/hide.
settings.cropGroupNote: Plant → water → harvest → eat. Each step appears only after the previous is done.
settings.bundleTrackerNote: Shows the bundle tracker box at the top of the main screen.
settings.shopScheduleShowNote: Shows schedules pinned in Info - Shop schedule at the top of the main screen.

blacksmith.pickupWarn: Blacksmith is closed on the ready day {ready} ({reason}); you'll pick it up the next open day

carpenter.tuesday: Carpenter's Shop is closed on Tuesdays
carpenter.festival: Carpenter's Shop is closed on festival days
carpenter.checkup: Closed on Summer 18 for Robin's checkup

bundle.title: Community Center bundles
bundle.qualityGoldNote: Every item must be submitted at gold quality (★) or higher.
bundle.needMetLock: Required count reached. Uncheck another item to select this one.
bundle.excludeUnobtainable: Exclude items not obtainable this season
bundle.hiddenNote: Items not obtainable this season are under 'Show all'
bundle.seasonNeedsNone: No items left to gather this season

bundleTracker.title: Bundle Tracker
bundleTracker.emptyRemix: No random bundles selected. Choose bundles in the Remix tab.

addTask.title: Add task
addTask.geodeMemo: Crack geodes - take ore geodes to the Blacksmith (Clint) to open
addTask.museumMemo: Donate to museum - donate newly found minerals and artifacts to the museum (Gunther)
addTask.wiltWarning: Won't mature this season - may wilt at season end
addTask.noSeasonCrops: No crops can be planted this season
addTask.wateringNote: Daily watering items are auto-added until harvest (regrow crops: until season end)
addTask.stagePlantNote: Off = treat as already planted; start from the next stage
addTask.stageWaterNote: Daily watering until harvest (turn off when using sprinklers)
addTask.stageHarvestNote: Off = stop after the last watering (no harvest task)
addTask.stageEatFoodNote: Eat a quality-buff food on harvest day
addTask.eatFoodMemo: Eat food on {crop} harvest day (quality buff)
addTask.greenhouseNote: Shows crops of every season and they never wilt at season end.
addTask.fruitGreenhouseNote: Greenhouse trees bear fruit year-round regardless of season.
addTask.fruitRepeatYearlyNote: When you advance to a new year, that year's harvest schedule is added automatically. Turn off to show only the first year.
addTask.fruitHarvestHint: Harvest reminder every 3 days during {season} (tree holds up to 3)
addTask.fruitHarvestGreenhouseHint: Harvest reminder every 3 days year-round (tree holds up to 3)
addTask.allHidden: No items to show. Re-enable them in Options.
addTask.optionsHint: Unchecked items are hidden from the Add Task menu.
addTask.optionsTreeHint: Check to show / expand sub-items with ▶, drag ⠿ to reorder (the order shown in Add Task).
addTask.repeatNote: When collected, re-adds the same start task that day.

info.title: Info
info.birthdayGiftHint: Pick a villager to see their favorite gifts.
info.moviePrefHint: Pick a villager to see their favorite movies and snacks.

movie.source: Source: Stardew Valley Wiki Movie Theater (CC BY-NC-SA 3.0)

fish.title: Fish info
fish.excludeUnobtainable: Exclude fish not catchable this season

seedEfficiency.title: Seed efficiency
seedEfficiency.qualityHint: Crop quality is set on harvest day - eating a Farming-buff food on harvest day raises quality. Set farming/foraging level and skills in Character settings.
seedEfficiency.note: Relative revenue (max = 100%). Reflects season, processing, fertilizer, food and character (level·skills); ignores seed cost, seed source and processing time. Keg/jar goods do not apply quality or Tiller.

shopSchedule.title: Shop schedule
shopSchedule.ruleFestival: Festival-day exceptions: Spirit's Eve, Dance of the Moonlight Jellies, Desert Festival, Trout Derby, SquidFest, Night Market.
shopSchedule.ruleKey: Key to the Town: once obtained, each shop's usable hours extend.
shopSchedule.boxEmpty: Pin schedules in Info → Shop schedule to show them here.
shopSchedule.source: Source: Stardew Valley Wiki - Shop Schedules (CC BY-NC-SA 3.0)

fishShop.name: Fish Shop
fishShop.note:
Open on rainy Saturdays.
Only 9–10 AM on Spring 9.
Opens at 8 AM after the Ginger Island boat repair.

clinic.name: Harvey's Clinic
clinic.note: Closed Saturdays. Until 2 PM on Tue/Thu; until 12 PM on Sun/Mon/Wed/Fri.

joja.name: JojaMart
joja.note: Permanently closes after Community Center bundles are completed.

oasis.name: Oasis & Casino
oasis.festival: Closed except Winter 25 (Feast of the Winter Star)
oasis.note: On Spring 25 (Pam's checkup) use Warp Totem: Desert or the Desert Obelisk.

saloon.name: Stardrop Saloon
saloon.note: On Fall 4 (Gus's checkup) opens at 12 PM but usable only after Gus returns at 4:30 PM.

wizardTower.name: Wizard's Tower
wizardTower.note: Accessible after 11 PM via the Witch's Hut.

desertTrader.name: Desert Trader
desertTrader.note: On Spring 25 (Pam's checkup) use Warp Totem: Desert or the Desert Obelisk.

character.title: Character settings
character.hint: Used for growth and quality in seed efficiency.
character.toolTierDesc: Used to decide whether to suggest a Watering Can upgrade on rainy forecasts (no suggestion at Iridium).

myTasks.title: My added tasks
myTasks.emptyFuture: No upcoming or rolled-over tasks to show
myTasks.futureOnly: Upcoming only (uncheck to also show earlier tasks)

weatherFortune.title: Check weather & fortune
weatherFortune.detail: Check tomorrow's weather forecast and the daily luck (fortune) on TV

animalCare.title: Tend animals
animalCare.detail: Pet, feed, and collect produce to keep friendship and quality up

farmCave.title: Mushroom cave harvest
farmCave.detail: Mushrooms regrow daily at 3:40 PM, harvest after that. Available daily (unlike the fruit cave, which doesn't generate daily)

hardwood.title: Harvest hardwood
hardwood.detail: Cut the hardwood stumps in the Secret Woods

travelingCart.title: Check Traveling Cart stock
travelingCart.detail: Fri & Sun, 6:00 AM–8:00 PM / Night Market (Winter 15–17) daily, 5:00 PM–2:00 AM

krobusSprinkler.title: Buy Iridium Sprinkler (Krobus)
krobusSprinkler.detail: Friday, buy an Iridium Sprinkler from the Sewers for automation (not on festival days)

desertTraderStaircase.title: Buy Staircase (Desert Trader)
desertTraderStaircase.detail: Sunday, trade Jade for Staircases to prep for the Skull Cavern

buySeeds.title: New season
buySeeds.detail: A new season has begun - you can buy this season's crop seeds

helpWanted.title: Check Help Wanted board
helpWanted.detail: Check the Help Wanted requests (delivery, gathering, etc.) at Pierre's board
helpWanted.eveWarning: Tomorrow is a festival - NPCs and shops are unavailable

forageWeekly.title: Gather forage
forageWeekly.detail: Saturday · Collect forageables around the valley. Forage resets on Sunday, so Saturday is most efficient.

crabPot.title: Check crab pots
crabPot.detail: Collect from crab pots and re-bait them

pondCheck.title: Check fish pond
pondCheck.detail: Collect the roe and produce that accumulate in the pond basket each day

specialOrders.title: Check Special Orders board
specialOrders.detail: Monday, accept new Special Orders at the town and Mr. Qi boards

queenOfSauceNew.title: Queen of Sauce (new episode)
queenOfSauceNew.detail: Sunday - check the new cooking recipe on TV

queenOfSauceRerun.title: Queen of Sauce (rerun)
queenOfSauceRerun.detail: Wednesday - rerun of the cooking recipe on TV
queenOfSauceRerun.note: If you don't check Sunday's new airing, the Wednesday rerun is shown.

footer.fan: An unofficial fan project, not affiliated with or endorsed by ConcernedApe / Stardew Valley.
footer.data: Game data and translations are adapted from the <wiki>Stardew Valley Wiki</wiki> and licensed under <license>CC BY-NC-SA 3.0</license>.
footer.code: Source code is available on <repo>GitHub</repo> under the MIT license.
footer.nonCommercial: This site is operated on a non-commercial basis.

gift.birthdayHint: Giving a loved or liked gift on a birthday grants 8x friendship.

carp.name: Carp
carp.location: 산 호수 비밀의 숲 연못 하수도

catfish.name: Catfish
catfish.location: 강 (마을+숲) 비밀의 숲 연못 마녀의 늪

lavaEel.name: Lava Eel
lavaEel.location: 광산 100층 낚시 7 레벨 이상 화산 칼데라

midnightCarp.name: Midnight Carp
midnightCarp.location: 산 호수 , 숲 호수, 진저 섬 호수와 강

crimsonfish.name: Crimsonfish
crimsonfish.location: 해변 의 동쪽 다리. 깊은 물에서. 낚시 레벨 5 필요.

angler.name: Angler
angler.location: 조자마트 북쪽에 있는 나무판자 다리. 낚시 레벨 3 필요.

legend.name: Legend
legend.location: 산 호수 통나무 근처. 낚시 레벨 10 필요.

glacierfish.name: Glacierfish
glacierfish.location: 화살머리 섬 남쪽 끝에 있는 잉걸불 수액 숲 . 깊은 물에서. 낚시 레벨 6 필요.

sonOfCrimsonfish.name: Son of Crimsonfish
sonOfCrimsonfish.location: 해변 의 동쪽 부두. 낚시 레벨 5 필요.

msAngler.name: Ms. Angler
msAngler.location: 조자마트 북쪽 나무판자 다리. 낚시 레벨 3 필요.

legendII.name: Legend II
legendII.location: 산 호수 통나무 근처. 낚시 레벨 10 이상 필요.

glacierfishJr.name: Glacierfish Jr.
glacierfishJr.location: 화살머리 섬 남쪽 끝에 있는 잉걸불 수액 숲 . 낚시 레벨 6 필요.

cooking.stirFry: 동굴 당근 1 흔한 버섯 1 케일 1 기름 1

crafting.qualitySprinkler: 철 주괴 1 금 주괴 1 정제된 석영 1
crafting.iridiumSprinkler: 금 주괴 1 이리듐 주괴 1 배터리 팩 1
crafting.mayonnaiseMachine: 나무 15 돌 15 땅의 수정 1 구리 주괴 1
crafting.beeHouse: 나무 40 석탄 8 철 주괴 1 메이플 시럽 1
crafting.cheesePress: 나무 45 돌 45 단단한 나무 10 구리 주괴 1
crafting.keg: 나무 30 구리 주괴 1 철 주괴 1 참나무 수지 1
crafting.fallSeeds: 흔한 버섯 1 야생 자두 1 헤이즐넛 1 블랙베리 1
crafting.barbedHook: 구리 주괴 1 철 주괴 1 금 주괴 1
crafting.crabPot: 나무 40 철 주괴 3 덫 사냥꾼 직업일 때: 나무 25 구리 주괴 2
crafting.iridiumBand: 이리듐 주괴 5 태양 정수 50 공허 정수 50
crafting.lifeElixir: 붉은 버섯 1 보라색 버섯 1 곰보버섯 1 살구버섯 1

a7.name: 새 친구
a7.desc: 주민 한 명과 친밀도 5 하트 달성.

a8.name: 절친
a8.desc: 주민 한 명과 친밀도 10 하트 달성.

a17.name: 크게 살기
a17.desc: 집 최대 크기로 업그레이드 하기. (지하 저장고까지가 아닌 2번째 업그레이드)

a28.name: 혼합 양식
a28.desc: 각 작물 을 15개씩 배송 . (자세한 내용은 아래의 노트 에서 볼 수 있습니다)

a29.name: 단일재배
a29.desc: 한 종류의 작물 을 300개 배송 . 자세한 내용은 아래의 노트 에서 볼 수 있습니다)

a34.name: Joja Co. Member Of The Year
a34.desc: 조자 지역 개발 프로젝트 전부 완성.

a36.name: Full House
a36.desc: 결혼 해서 두 명의 아이 낳기.

a39.name: Protector Of The Valley
a39.desc: 모험가의 길드 의 몬스터 토벌 목표 전부 완료.

a40.name: Fector's Challenge
a40.desc: ' 대초원의 왕의 모험 '을 죽지 않고 클리어. (히든 업적)

a42.name: 독서왕
a42.desc: 모든 책 읽기. 참고: 능력 책에만 적용됩니다.

a44.name: 블루 리본
a44.desc: 스타듀 밸리 품평회 농가 전시 우승하기.

a46.name: 좋은 이웃
a46.desc: 숲의 이웃 이 가정을 꾸릴 수 있게 돕기.

logic.weatherFortune: 매일 · 당일 끝남(안 보면 다음 날 새 날씨·운세). 완료 안 해도 다음 날 새로 생성.
logic.animalCare: 매일 · 당일 끝남. 매일 새로 진행해야 함.
logic.farmCave: 매일 오후 3시 40분 버섯 리젠 · 수거 전까지 누적(미루기).
logic.travelingCart: 매주 금·일(+야시장 매일) · 그날 안 하면 사라짐.
logic.krobusSprinkler: 매주 금요일 · 그날 안 하면 사라짐. 축제일 제외.
logic.desertTraderStaircase: 매주 일요일 · 그날 안 하면 사라짐.
logic.specialOrders: 매주 월요일 갱신 · 다음 월요일까지 미룰 수 있음.
logic.queenOfSauceNew: 일요일 신규 방영 · 안 보면(체크 안 하면) 같은 레시피를 수요일 재방송으로만 다시 볼 수 있음. 당일 끝남.
logic.queenOfSauceRerun: 수요일 재방송 · 신규 방영을 못 본 경우에만 표시. 당일 끝남.
logic.helpWanted: 매일 · 당일 끝남. 축제 전날·당일에는 상점/NPC가 막혀 표시 안 함.
logic.forageWeekly: 매주 토요일 · 당일 끝남. 채집물은 일요일에 리셋되어 토요일에 모으는 게 가장 효율적.
logic.pondCheck: 매일 · 당일 끝남(연못 바구니에 매일 생산물 누적).
logic.festival: 정보 · 축제일(상점/NPC 일정 영향). 완료 표시 없음.
logic.cropDeadline: 정보 · 이 날까지 심어야 이번 계절 수확 가능. 완료 표시 없음.
logic.foraging: 정보 · 계절 채집 이벤트 기간(새먼베리철 등). 완료 표시 없음.
logic.birthday: 당일 한정 · 오늘 전달해야 '생일 선물'. 안 하면 일반 선물이 됨.
logic.newSeason: 정보 · 새 계절 시작(이번 계절 씨앗 구매 가능). 완료 표시 없음.
logic.plant: 심을 때까지 미뤄짐 · 심어야 물주기·수확이 생김. 온실 아니면 수확 계절 지나면 사라짐.
logic.harvest: 물주기를 다 마치면 생성 · 수확 안 하면 미뤄짐. 온실 아니면 수확 계절 지나면 사라짐.
logic.watering: 심은 뒤 매일 1회 · 물 안 주면 밀리고 수확도 함께 밀림. 온실 아니면 수확 불가해지면 사라짐.
logic.fruit: 무기한 · 수확 안 하면 미뤄짐(최대 3개 누적). 온실 아니면 계절 지나면 사라짐.
logic.tool: 무기한 · 업그레이드 맡길 때까지 미뤄짐(대장간 휴무일 반영).
logic.machine: 무기한 · 장비 사용/수령까지 미뤄짐. 상위 사용 후 수령 생성.
logic.build: 무기한 · 건설할 때까지 미뤄짐(필요 재료·목공 작업실 휴무 반영).
logic.eatFood: 수확일 · 수확 전에 먹어야 함. 작물 수확을 먼저 체크하면 자동 삭제.
